commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: I saw another mighty Angel. Some expound it of Christ himself: others of an Angel, representing the power of God over the sea and land. (Witham)

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content: Also, as he goes forth on a white horse, conquering and to conquer, receives a crown of victory; and another

commentaries.author: Victorinus of Pettau
commentaries.content: He signifies that that mighty angel who, he says, descended from heaven, clothed with a cloud, is our Lord, as we have above narrated.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
